dsl_rule.translation_notes: ADX_14 > 25 used to confirm trend presence. Price vs SMA_20 determines trend direction (long if above, short if below). Exit triggered by trend reversal (price crossing SMA_20) or when trailing stop breached via ATR spike. The 15-bar reversal pattern and 20-period trailing stop are approximated using ADX confirmation and ATR-based volatility detection. Exit reversal threshold of 5% incorporated into stop_loss_pct.

backtest_rule.reason: ADX_14 > 25 used to confirm trend presence. Price vs SMA_20 determines trend direction (long if above, short if below). Exit triggered by trend reversal (price crossing SMA_20) or when trailing stop breached via ATR spike. The 15-bar reversal pattern and 20-period trailing stop are approximated using ADX confirmation and ATR-based volatility detection. Exit reversal threshold of 5% incorporated into stop_loss_pct.

source_rule_text: A trader should remain in a position and allow profits to run as long as the identified trend continues in the trader's favor, exiting only when the trend direction shifts.
